content.description: Executive view of SSO migration progress — apps migrated, remaining, and auth volume shift.
content.eai:data:
<dashboard version="2" theme="light">
    <label>ADFS → Okta Migration: Executive Summary</label>
    <description>Executive view of SSO migration progress — apps migrated, remaining, and auth volume shift.</description>
    <definition><![CDATA[{
  "title": "ADFS \u2192 Okta Migration: Executive Summary",
  "description": "Executive view of SSO migration progress \u2014 apps migrated, remaining, and auth volume shift.",
  "defaults": {
    "dataSources": {
      "ds.search": {}
    }
  },
  "visualizations": {
    "viz_migrated": {
      "containerOptions": {},
      "dataSources": {
        "primary": "ds_migrated"
      },
      "options": {
        "sparklineDisplay": "off",
        "trendDisplay": "off",
        "majorColor": "#3fa21f"
      },
      "showLastUpdated": false,
      "showProgressBar": false,
      "title": "Apps Migrated",
      "type": "splunk.singlevalue",
      "description": "All production apps with Okta SSO logins (first prod: Keeper, 2026-04-03)"
    },
    "viz_remaining": {
      "containerOptions": {},
      "dataSources": {
        "primary": "ds_remaining"
      },
      "options": {
        "sparklineDisplay": "off",
        "trendDisplay": "off",
        "majorColor": "#c12f28"
      },
      "showLastUpdated": false,
      "showProgressBar": false,
      "title": "Apps Remaining",
      "type": "splunk.singlevalue",
      "description": "Total in-scope apps (from the SSO Migration Schedule) minus apps already live in Okta"
    },
    "viz_pct": {
      "containerOptions": {},
      "dataSources": {
        "primary": "ds_pct"
      },
      "options": {
        "sparklineDisplay": "off",
        "trendDisplay": "off",
        "majorColor": "#3fa21f",
        "unit": "%",
        "unitPosition": "after"
      },
      "showLastUpdated": false,
      "showProgressBar": false,
      "title": "% Complete",
      "type": "splunk.singlevalue",
      "description": "Based on the SSO Migration Schedule's current in-scope total"
    },
    "viz_burndown": {
      "containerOptions": {},
      "dataSources": {
        "primary": "ds_burndown"
      },
      "options": {},
      "showLastUpdated": false,
      "showProgressBar": false,
      "title": "ADFS vs Okta Auth Volume Over Time",
      "type": "splunk.area",
      "description": "Daily auth volume \u2014 last 90 days"
    },
    "viz_migrated_apps": {
      "containerOptions": {},
      "dataSources": {
        "primary": "ds_migrated_apps"
      },
      "options": {},
      "showLastUpdated": false,
      "showProgressBar": false,
      "title": "Migrated Applications",
      "type": "splunk.table",
      "description": "Apps with active Okta SSO logins (first production migration: Keeper, 2026-04-03). Okta internal apps excluded."
    },
    "viz_adfs_remaining": {
      "containerOptions": {},
      "dataSources": {
        "primary": "ds_adfs_remaining"
      },
      "options": {},
      "showLastUpdated": false,
      "showProgressBar": false,
      "title": "Top Remaining ADFS Applications",
      "type": "splunk.table",
      "description": "Top ADFS apps by session volume \u2014 last 90 days"
    },
    "viz_header": {
      "type": "splunk.markdown",
      "options": {
        "markdown": "Migration counts reflect all activity since **2026-01-01**. First production migration: **Keeper, 2026-04-03**. Auth volume trend and remaining ADFS apps show the **last 90 days**."
      },
      "containerOptions": {},
      "showLastUpdated": false,
      "showProgressBar": false
    }
  },
  "dataSources": {
    "ds_migrated": {
      "options": {
        "query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log (eventType=user.authentication.sso OR eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_IDP OR eventType=app.oauth2.authorize.code) | spath output=tgt_app path=\"target{0}.displayName\" | spath output=redirect_uri path=\"debugContext.debugData.redirectUri\" | spath output=client_id path=\"actor.id\" | spath output=actor_display path=\"actor.displayName\" | eval app_unit=case(eventType=\"app.oauth2.authorize.code\", redirect_uri, 1==1, tgt_app) | lookup okta_oidc_internal_clients.csv client_id OUTPUT internal AS oidc_internal | where isnull(oidc_internal) | lookup okta_apps_inventory.csv uri AS app_unit OUTPUT friendly_name AS friendly_oidc | lookup okta_apps_inventory.csv application AS app_unit OUTPUT friendly_name AS friendly_saml | eval actor_display_for_oidc=if(eventType=\"app.oauth2.authorize.code\", actor_display, null()) | eval app=coalesce(friendly_oidc, friendly_saml, actor_display_for_oidc, app_unit) | lookup okta_app_aliases.csv unit AS app OUTPUT canonical AS aliased | eval app=coalesce(aliased, app) | lookup okta_internal_apps.csv app OUTPUT internal | where isnull(internal) AND isnotnull(app) AND app!=\"\" AND app!=\"OpenID Connect Client\" AND app!=\"unknown\" | stats dc(app) as total",
        "queryParameters": {
          "earliest": "1767225600",
          "latest": "now"
        }
      },
      "type": "ds.search"
    },
    "ds_remaining": {
      "options": {
        "query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log (eventType=user.authentication.sso OR eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_IDP OR eventType=app.oauth2.authorize.code) | spath output=tgt_app path=\"target{0}.displayName\" | spath output=redirect_uri path=\"debugContext.debugData.redirectUri\" | spath output=client_id path=\"actor.id\" | spath output=actor_display path=\"actor.displayName\" | eval app_unit=case(eventType=\"app.oauth2.authorize.code\", redirect_uri, 1==1, tgt_app) | lookup okta_oidc_internal_clients.csv client_id OUTPUT internal AS oidc_internal | where isnull(oidc_internal) | lookup okta_apps_inventory.csv uri AS app_unit OUTPUT friendly_name AS friendly_oidc | lookup okta_apps_inventory.csv application AS app_unit OUTPUT friendly_name AS friendly_saml | eval actor_display_for_oidc=if(eventType=\"app.oauth2.authorize.code\", actor_display, null()) | eval app=coalesce(friendly_oidc, friendly_saml, actor_display_for_oidc, app_unit) | lookup okta_app_aliases.csv unit AS app OUTPUT canonical AS aliased | eval app=coalesce(aliased, app) | lookup okta_internal_apps.csv app OUTPUT internal | where isnull(internal) AND isnotnull(app) AND app!=\"\" AND app!=\"OpenID Connect Client\" AND app!=\"unknown\" | stats dc(app) as migrated | appendcols [| inputlookup okta_apps_inventory.csv | stats count as in_scope] | eval remaining=max(0, in_scope-migrated) | table remaining",
        "queryParameters": {
          "earliest": "1767225600",
          "latest": "now"
        }
      },
      "type": "ds.search"
    },
    "ds_pct": {
      "options": {
        "query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log (eventType=user.authentication.sso OR eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_IDP OR eventType=app.oauth2.authorize.code) | spath output=tgt_app path=\"target{0}.displayName\" | spath output=redirect_uri path=\"debugContext.debugData.redirectUri\" | spath output=client_id path=\"actor.id\" | spath output=actor_display path=\"actor.displayName\" | eval app_unit=case(eventType=\"app.oauth2.authorize.code\", redirect_uri, 1==1, tgt_app) | lookup okta_oidc_internal_clients.csv client_id OUTPUT internal AS oidc_internal | where isnull(oidc_internal) | lookup okta_apps_inventory.csv uri AS app_unit OUTPUT friendly_name AS friendly_oidc | lookup okta_apps_inventory.csv application AS app_unit OUTPUT friendly_name AS friendly_saml | eval actor_display_for_oidc=if(eventType=\"app.oauth2.authorize.code\", actor_display, null()) | eval app=coalesce(friendly_oidc, friendly_saml, actor_display_for_oidc, app_unit) | lookup okta_app_aliases.csv unit AS app OUTPUT canonical AS aliased | eval app=coalesce(aliased, app) | lookup okta_internal_apps.csv app OUTPUT internal | where isnull(internal) AND isnotnull(app) AND app!=\"\" AND app!=\"OpenID Connect Client\" AND app!=\"unknown\" | stats dc(app) as migrated | appendcols [| inputlookup okta_apps_inventory.csv | stats count as in_scope] | eval pct_raw=migrated/in_scope*100 | eval pct=if(pct_raw>0 AND pct_raw<1,\"<1\",tostring(round(pct_raw,1))) | table pct",
        "queryParameters": {
          "earliest": "1767225600",
          "latest": "now"
        }
      },
      "type": "ds.search"
    },
    "ds_burndown": {
      "options": {
        "query": "index=windows_events EventCode=1200 (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*) | rex \"Activity ID:\\s*(?<activity_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\" | dedup activity_id | eval platform=\"ADFS\" | append [search index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log (eventType=user.authentication.sso OR eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_IDP OR eventType=app.oauth2.authorize.code) | spath output=tgt_app path=\"target{0}.displayName\" | spath output=redirect_uri path=\"debugContext.debugData.redirectUri\" | spath output=client_id path=\"actor.id\" | spath output=actor_display path=\"actor.displayName\" | eval app_unit=case(eventType=\"app.oauth2.authorize.code\", redirect_uri, 1==1, tgt_app) | lookup okta_oidc_internal_clients.csv client_id OUTPUT internal AS oidc_internal | where isnull(oidc_internal) | lookup okta_apps_inventory.csv uri AS app_unit OUTPUT friendly_name AS friendly_oidc | lookup okta_apps_inventory.csv application AS app_unit OUTPUT friendly_name AS friendly_saml | eval actor_display_for_oidc=if(eventType=\"app.oauth2.authorize.code\", actor_display, null()) | eval app=coalesce(friendly_oidc, friendly_saml, actor_display_for_oidc, app_unit) | lookup okta_app_aliases.csv unit AS app OUTPUT canonical AS aliased | eval app=coalesce(aliased, app) | lookup okta_internal_apps.csv app OUTPUT internal | where isnull(internal) AND isnotnull(app) AND app!=\"\" AND app!=\"OpenID Connect Client\" AND app!=\"unknown\" | eval platform=\"Okta\"] | timechart span=1d count by platform",
        "queryParameters": {
          "earliest": "-90d@d",
          "latest": "now"
        }
      },
      "type": "ds.search"
    },
    "ds_migrated_apps": {
      "options": {
        "query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log (eventType=user.authentication.sso OR eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_IDP OR eventType=app.oauth2.authorize.code) | spath output=tgt_app path=\"target{0}.displayName\" | spath output=redirect_uri path=\"debugContext.debugData.redirectUri\" | spath output=client_id path=\"actor.id\" | spath output=actor_display path=\"actor.displayName\" | eval app_unit=case(eventType=\"app.oauth2.authorize.code\", redirect_uri, 1==1, tgt_app) | lookup okta_oidc_internal_clients.csv client_id OUTPUT internal AS oidc_internal | where isnull(oidc_internal) | lookup okta_apps_inventory.csv uri AS app_unit OUTPUT friendly_name AS friendly_oidc | lookup okta_apps_inventory.csv application AS app_unit OUTPUT friendly_name AS friendly_saml | eval actor_display_for_oidc=if(eventType=\"app.oauth2.authorize.code\", actor_display, null()) | eval app=coalesce(friendly_oidc, friendly_saml, actor_display_for_oidc, app_unit) | lookup okta_app_aliases.csv unit AS app OUTPUT canonical AS aliased | eval app=coalesce(aliased, app) | lookup okta_internal_apps.csv app OUTPUT internal | where isnull(internal) AND isnotnull(app) AND app!=\"\" AND app!=\"OpenID Connect Client\" AND app!=\"unknown\" | stats min(_time) as migrated_on count as auths by app | eval migrated_on=strftime(migrated_on,\"%Y-%m-%d\") | sort migrated_on | rename app AS Application, migrated_on AS \"First Seen in Okta\", auths AS \"Auth Events\"",
        "queryParameters": {
          "earliest": "1767225600",
          "latest": "now"
        }
      },
      "type": "ds.search"
    },
    "ds_adfs_remaining": {
      "options": {
        "query": "index=windows_events (EventCode=403 OR EventCode IN (1200,1201,1202,1203)) (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*) | rex \"Activity ID:\\s*(?<activity_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\" | rex field=_raw \"<RelyingParty>(?<relying_party_raw>[^<]+)\" | stats values(EventCode) as stages values(relying_party_raw) as rps_raw by activity_id | eval token_ok=if(mvfind(stages,\"1200\")>=0,1,0) | eval cred_ok=if(mvfind(stages,\"1202\")>=0,1,0) | eval outcome=case(token_ok==1 AND cred_ok==1,\"Success\",1=1,\"Other\") | where outcome=\"Success\" | eval rps_raw=mvdedup(rps_raw) | eval rp_clean=mvfilter(rps_raw!=\"WS-Trust endpoint (legacy clients)\" AND rps_raw!=\"https://host.example.gov/[redacted-path] AND rps_raw!=\"urn:microsoft:userinfo\") | eval relying_party=coalesce(mvindex(rp_clean,0),mvindex(rps_raw,0)) | where relying_party!=\"urn:microsoft:userinfo\" | lookup ADFS_friendly_names.csv url as relying_party output friendlyName as rp_friendly | eval app=coalesce(rp_friendly,relying_party) | stats count as sessions by app | sort -sessions | head 20 | rename app AS Application, sessions AS \"ADFS Sessions\"",
        "queryParameters": {
          "earliest": "-90d@d",
          "latest": "now"
        }
      },
      "type": "ds.search"
    }
  },
  "layout": {
    "globalInputs": [],
    "layoutDefinitions": {
      "layout_1": {
        "options": {
          "display": "auto",
          "height": 1120,
          "width": 2100
        },
        "structure": [
          {
            "item": "viz_header",
            "type": "block",
            "position": {
              "x": 0,
              "y": 0,
              "w": 2100,
              "h": 50
            }
          },
          {
            "item": "viz_migrated",
            "position": {
              "h": 180,
              "w": 680,
              "x": 0,
              "y": 60
            },
            "type": "block"
          },
          {
            "item": "viz_remaining",
            "position": {
              "h": 180,
              "w": 680,
              "x": 690,
              "y": 60
            },
            "type": "block"
          },
          {
            "item": "viz_pct",
            "position": {
              "h": 180,
              "w": 720,
              "x": 1380,
              "y": 60
            },
            "type": "block"
          },
          {
            "item": "viz_burndown",
            "position": {
              "h": 380,
              "w": 2100,
              "x": 0,
              "y": 250
            },
            "type": "block"
          },
          {
            "item": "viz_migrated_apps",
            "position": {
              "h": 460,
              "w": 1040,
              "x": 0,
              "y": 640
            },
            "type": "block"
          },
          {
            "item": "viz_adfs_remaining",
            "position": {
              "h": 460,
              "w": 1050,
              "x": 1050,
              "y": 640
            },
            "type": "block"
          }
        ],
        "type": "absolute"
      }
    },
    "tabs": {
      "items": [
        {
          "label": "Migration Progress",
          "layoutId": "layout_1"
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}]]></definition>
    <meta type="hiddenElements"><![CDATA[
{
	"hideEdit": false,
	"hideOpenInSearch": false,
	"hideExport": false
}
    ]]></meta>
</dashboard>
content.label: ADFS → Okta Migration: Executive Summary
